Real-time overview of your entire business in one place.

Inventory

Smart stock management with warehouses, pricing & adjustments.

Funds

Track and control business funds seamlessly.

Customers

Accountant

Powerful accounting tools, journals & chart of accounts.

📊 Dashboard

Get a real-time overview of sales, expenses, and key business metrics.

📦 Inventory

Manage stock, movements, price lists, and amendments seamlessly.

💰 Funds

Track cash, bank, and funding sources with clarity.

👥 Customers

Handle invoices, quotes, receipts, credit notes, and customer statements.

🚚 Suppliers

Manage suppliers, bills, payments, debit notes, and GRNs.

🧮 Accountant

Record manual & recurring journals, adjust currencies, and lock transactions.

💵 Payroll

Automate employee records, salaries, deductions, and payslips.

📈 Reports

Access detailed financial, inventory, and payroll reports for decisions.

🗂️ Plans

Manage subscription plans and track their usage efficiently.

📁 Files

Organize documents, backups, and manage file recovery seamlessly.

🤝 CRM

Manage customer relationships, track leads, and boost sales efficiently.

📧 Email

Send, receive, and organize emails directly from your dashboard.

⚙️ Settings

Customize organization profile, warehouses, taxes, costing and preferences.

Helpful Resources

📖 User Guide

Step-by-step instructions to get started with Acacia Books ERP.

View Guide →
Overview of metrics, KPIs, and trends in your business.
  • Stock: Add/edit items, track stock levels.
  • Movement: Track stock transfers and shipments.
  • Price List: Manage prices and discounts.
  • Amendments & Bulk Adjustments: Correct and update stock efficiently.
  • Customer profiles, invoices, quotes.
  • Credit notes, sales returns, receipts, and delivery tracking.
  • Account statements for better monitoring.
  • Supplier management, bills, purchase orders.
  • Payments, tax, operational costs, and GRN tracking.
  • Manual & recurring journals.
  • Assets & liabilities, budgets, charts of accounts.
  • Transaction locking for security.
  • Employees, earnings, deductions, attendance.
  • Payslip generation, statutory compliance, payroll reports.
Generate financial, inventory, customer, supplier, and payroll reports.
Organization profile, warehouses, tax compliance, user management, VAT, preferences, and templates.

🎓 Video Tutorials

Watch short videos to learn features like POS, Inventory, Payroll, and more.

📊 POS: Learn how to manage your point-of-sale efficiently.

📦 Inventory: Track stock, movements, and updates easily.

💵 Payroll: Generate payslips, track attendance, and manage deductions.

Watch All Videos →

🛠 FAQ & Support

Find answers to common questions, troubleshoot quickly, or contact support directly.

Acacia Books ERP is a cloud-based platform to manage inventory, customers, suppliers, payroll, and finances in one place.
To upgrade your plan, please contact our support team at support@acaciabooks.com. They will guide you through the available plans and assist with the upgrade process.
Support is available via email at support@acaciabooks.com or through the support widget in your dashboard.
Visit Full FAQ

🔗 Integrations

Connect Acacia Books with your favorite apps and services to streamline your workflow.

Automate your newsletters and promotional emails directly from Acacia Books.
Accept payments online and reconcile them automatically with your accounts.
Sync your inventory and sales data seamlessly between Acacia Books and your online store.
Connect Now

Powering Smarter Business Operations

Acacia Books is an all-in-one cloud ERP platform built to simplify management, automate workflows, and help businesses grow faster with confidence.

Everything Your Business Needs — In One Platform

From inventory control to payroll automation, Acacia Books centralizes your core business processes into a secure cloud system.

Why Businesses Choose Acacia Books

  • ✔ Cloud-Based & Secure
  • ✔ Easy Setup
  • ✔ Scalable
  • ✔ Support Team
  • ✔ Modern System

Track sales, inventory, and performance with real-time analytics and smart dashboards.

Our Apps

Access your business tools anywhere, automate workflows, and manage everything in real-time with ease.

Inventory

Track stock levels and manage inventory easily in real-time with smart automation and alerts.

Expenses

Monitor spending, categorize expenses, and get clear financial reports instantly.

Payroll

Automate salaries, deductions, and employee payments with full accuracy and speed.

Sales & Billing

Create invoices, manage customers, and track payments with real-time insights.

Insights to Help You Grow

Practical guides and system walkthroughs to help you master Acacia Books ERP.

Inventory Management

How to Manage Inventory Efficiently

Learn how Acacia Books tracks stock levels in real time, updates quantities after every sale and purchase, and generates accurate inventory reports automatically.

Sales Hub

How the Sales Hub Works

Create quotations, convert them into invoices, record customer payments, and automatically update inventory and financial records from one centralized dashboard.

Purchase Hub

How the Purchase Hub Works

Generate purchase orders, receive goods into inventory, manage supplier balances, and track payments while keeping your accounting records updated automatically.

Payroll & Compliance

Payroll Compliance Guide

Process salaries, calculate deductions, generate payslips, and maintain compliance records with automated payroll management tools.

Business Growth

Scaling Your Business with ERP

Use dashboards, financial reports, and analytics to eliminate bottlenecks and confidently scale your operations.

Reports & Analytics

Financial Reports & Insights

Generate detailed financial reports, track KPIs, visualize growth trends, and make data-driven decisions to optimize business performance.

    📦Tax Computation

    Particulars Amount (KSh) Total
    A. Accounting Profit as per Financial Statements
    Add: Non-Deductible Expenses
    – Entertainment expenses
    – Fines and penalties
    – Depreciation (per books)
    Subtotal (Additions)
    Less: Tax Allowances / Deductions
    – Capital allowance (per tax rules)
    – Approved donations
    Subtotal (Deductions)
    B. Adjusted (Taxable) Profit
    C. Tax Rate (Corporate Tax @ 30%) 30%
    D. Income Tax Payable
    E. Less: Advance Tax Paid / Withholding Tax
    F. Balance Tax Payable / (Refund Due)
